title.en: Ye Tian's eyes stared at Killua and felt Killua...

content.en:
"It's this bloody person who killed those half-step Yae Ancestors!"

Ye Tian's eyes stared at Killua and felt Killua's strength.

However, he felt that Killua's strength should be slightly worse than his own, but it was not much, and if he really wanted to fight, no one would want to defeat the other party.

If his life level was raised a little more, he might be able to suppress Killua even more.

But right now, he didn't have time to raise his life level.

Rumble!!!!

Killua attacked, and Ye Tian fought with it.

As soon as they fought, Ye Tian and Killua were evenly matched, and there was not much difference in strength.

But Ye Tian knew very well that if it was really this bloody man who killed those half-step eightfold ancestors, it would definitely not be this strength.

In other words, Killua has hole cards!

Soon.

Killua had the surrounding primordial artifacts sacrifice to him, turning into blood-colored energy that poured into his body, helping him briefly increase his strength.

In an instant, Killua's strength skyrocketed!

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian finally understood.

This must be the secret technique of the Blood Man Tribe, and it can even make a large number of primordial artifacts around it sacrifice themselves to make Killua improve its strength.

This kind of method can only be done by primordial antiquities, and it makes no sense to be a cultivator at all!

Because it is impossible for a practitioner to sacrifice himself to improve the strength of others.

But the Primordial Antiquities have no wisdom, they will only obey orders, and it is very simple to cultivate the Primordial Antiquities, and the Bloody Tribe is afraid that there are a large number of clansmen and affiliated Primordial Antiquities.

Therefore, the Blood Tribe didn't have to care about the sacrifice of these primordial artifacts at all.

Even if you use the lives of countless primordial artifacts to kill a demonic half-step eightfold ancestor cultivator, it will be worth it!

Rumble!!!

The Killua with a large increase in strength shattered Ye Tian's colorless light shield with one claw, pierced through Ye Tian's Ninefold Black Domain, and directly shattered Ye Tian's body by half.

But in an instant, Ye Tian recovered again.

smashed Ye Tian's body again and again, but no matter how Killua attacked, he couldn't kill Ye Tian.

As time passed, Killua didn't know how many times he attacked, but Ye Tian still didn't have any problems.

"How so?"

Killua is stunned!

He had also killed several half-step Eightfold Ancestors before, and he knew that these Half-Step Eightfold Ancestors were the most demonic geniuses on the cultivator's side, and their combat power was even more terrifying than some of the Eightfold Origin Ancestors of the Blood Man Tribe.

But even so, he still killed those half-step eightfold ancestors, and he didn't find it difficult to kill!

However, he found that Ye Tian's life-preserving ability and recovery ability were too terrifying, and it was even more difficult to kill than the most demonic primordial ancients!

"No, I have to escape!"

Killua didn't dare to continue attacking, his strength increase was temporary, and now he was about to reach the limit.

If time passes, he will be in a period of weakness for a certain period of time, which is also the disadvantage of temporarily improving his strength.

Once his strength is weak, he is not Ye Tian's opponent, and he may even be killed by Ye Tian.

Killua fled, and Ye Tian couldn't stop him.

In the blink of an eye, Killua was gone.

Subsequently, Ye Tian reported Killua's information to the upper echelons of the Nine-Story Building.

As for whether the other half-step Eightfold Ancestors can compete against Killua, that's none of his business.

Anyway, he's not afraid of Killua!

Time lapses –

Ye Tian found more and more resources in this secret place, and the major forces now knew about the existence of Killua and came up with various response tests.

Although they couldn't kill Killua, they could let those half-step Eightfold Ancestors escape from Killua's hands.

Of course, the half-step Eightfold Ancestor, who was slightly weaker and had no means to save his life, also withdrew one by one.

After all, lives are more important than resources.

......

"I found a lot of resources this time, and if I cultivate well after I go out, it will be enough to raise my life level to above 35!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

Ye Tian found another good thing.

In the depths of the secret place, a purple-gold mountain range stands here.

And here, dense primordial antiquities are being mined for veins.

However, these primordial artifacts are slow to move, and the efficiency of mining is mediocre.

Ye Tian was blocked when he approached this area, but he fought all the way through.

At this time, as he approached this mountain range, he felt the suppression of the mountain range, and his thinking, speed, and reaction were all decreasing.

If he really entered this mountain range, he would be like these primordial antiquities, his movements would be very slow and slow, and his strength would be greatly suppressed, which looked quite funny.

"This is the Purple Lazuli Vein of Time and Space!"

Ye Tian identified it and confirmed.

The thought of having such a vein here made him extremely excited.

This is a real treasure!

The space-time purple lazuli can be used to refine the Primordial Dao Treasure, but its greatest use is to refine the Origin Dao embryo.

For example, if you refine the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo, you can use the space-time purple lazuli as one of the main materials.

The value of such a huge space-time purple lazuli is enough to move the Nine Primordial Ancestors!

"I'm afraid that the Blood People Tribe attaches great importance to this space-time purple lazuli vein, so they want to kill us half-step eightfold ancestors!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It's a pity that that Killua didn't do this, and let him break into here and discover this space-time purple lazuli vein!

But soon, he had a sad face!

Although the space-time purple lazuli vein is precious, it is too difficult to mine, this material is extremely strong, even if the half-step eight-fold ancestor enters the vein, the strength will be suppressed, the reaction and action will become very slow, and it is difficult to mine a piece of space-time purple lazuli vein.

Today, there are countless primordial antiquities in this vein, almost all over this mountain range, but in fact, not much space-time purple lazuli can be mined.

But the Blood Tribe has occupied this secret place for I don't know how many years, so it has definitely mined a lot of space-time purple lazuli.

However, even if he occupied this place with a half-step Eightfold Ancestor, he wouldn't be able to mine much space-time purple lazuli!

"Maybe the Nine-Story Building has a way to quickly mine the space-time purple lazuli!"

As a result, another copy of Ye Tian's body searched for detailed information about the space-time purple lazuli in the Nine-Story Building, and this side began to slaughter this group of primordial antiquities.

Thundered!!!!

The dense array of primordial artifacts were killed by Ye Tian, and these primordial artifacts did not run, they were instructed to mine space-time purple lazuli, and they had no idea of escaping at all.

The other side.

Killua learned about the situation on this side of the Purple Lazuli Vein through the Blood Mirror, so he immediately reported it to the Blood Tribe.

And the instruction given by the Blood Man Tribe was to ignore this space-time purple lazuli vein, after all, mining this vein was too time-consuming, and a mere half-step Eightfold Ancestor couldn't do anything at all.

At this time, the Blood Tribe is worried about whether it can keep this secret place, which is the key issue.
